en: them are so in urge, so hopelessly dependent on the system, that they will fight to protect it.
Were you listening to me, Neil, or were you looking at the woman in the red dress?
ko: 아니면 빨간 드레스를 입은 여자를 보고 있었니?

en: I was... Look again. Who is it?
This... this isn't the Matrix. No.
It's another training program designed to teach you one thing.
ko: 이것은 너에게 한 가지를 가르치기 위해 설계된 또 다른 훈련 프로그램이다.

en: If you are not one of us, you are one of them.
ko: 너가 우리 중 하나가 아니라면, 너는 그들 중 하나다. 그들은 누구인가?

en: They can move in and out of any software still hardwired to their system.
ko: 그들은 여전히 시스템에 연결된 어떤 소프트웨어든지 들어가고 나올 수 있다.

en: That means that anyone we haven't unplugged is potentially an agent.
ko: 즉, 우리가 플러그를 뺀 적이 없는 누구든지

en: Inside the Matrix, they are everyone, and they are no one.
We have survived by hiding from them, by running from them, but they are the gatekeepers.
